_readme: Hand-maintained source of truth for your PUBLIC Vinted listings — never modified by the scripts.
Vinted's terms prohibit scraping, so you copy your own listing info here (you wrote it, you own it).
Add one object per listing to `items`, then run: npm run sync:catalog

Optional fields: title_en, desc_fr, desc_en, img, images[], category (homie-vibe | cable-management | lampes | bureau | gadgets), badge (eco-pla | limited | made-to-order | null), status (active | sold | soon), material, location, created_at (YYYY-MM-DD).
Omitted category/badge are inferred from keywords. See README.md § Catalogue.
